Extract selected elements from a 3D array into a compact 3D structure. 


\begin{DoxyParams}[1]{Parameters}
\mbox{\texttt{ in}}  & {\em matrix} & Source 3D array. \\
\hline
\mbox{\texttt{ in}}  & {\em ind\+Vec\+Triplet} & List of index triplets {\ttfamily }(i,j,k) to extract. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
A 3D array where each selected element is stored as a 1×1 "{}slice"{} (shape {\ttfamily }\mbox{[}\mbox{[}value\mbox{]}\mbox{]}), preserving 3D semantics for downstream code.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Each value is obtained via \doxylink{structIntegrandInter_adb71cb8507ba98a63b290ec0acd8d628}{get\+Value()} (bounds-\/checked) and appended as a 1×1 block to the output. \begin{DoxyWarning}{Warning}
Out-\/of-\/bounds indices yield a zero value (see \doxylink{structIntegrandInter_adb71cb8507ba98a63b290ec0acd8d628}{get\+Value()}). 
\end{DoxyWarning}

In-\/place scalar multiplication of a 3D array. 


\begin{DoxyParams}[1]{Parameters}
\mbox{\texttt{ in,out}}  & {\em vec} & Target 3D array whose elements are scaled. \\
\hline
\mbox{\texttt{ in}}  & {\em scalar} & Complex scaling factor applied to every element.\\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
Traverses all dimensions and multiplies each entry of {\ttfamily vec} by {\ttfamily scalar}. \begin{DoxyNote}{Note}
Operates in place; no copies are created. 
\end{DoxyNote}

static void Integrand\+Inter\+::subtract\+Vector (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{std\+::vector$<$ std\+::vector$<$ std\+::vector$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} $>$ $>$ $>$ \&}]{a}{, }\item[{const std\+::vector$<$ std\+::vector$<$ std\+::vector$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} $>$ $>$ $>$ \&}]{b}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [inline]}, {\ttfamily [static]}, {\ttfamily [private]}}



In-\/place element-\/wise subtraction of two 3D arrays. 


\begin{DoxyParams}[1]{Parameters}
\mbox{\texttt{ in,out}}  & {\em a} & Left-\/hand 3D array; updated with {\ttfamily a-\/=b} for overlapping extents. \\
\hline
\mbox{\texttt{ in}}  & {\em b} & Right-\/hand 3D array to subtract from {\ttfamily a}.\\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
Iterates the three nested dimensions and subtracts corresponding entries. If a size mismatch is found at any nesting level, that branch is skipped (or the whole operation returns early at the outermost level). \begin{DoxyNote}{Note}
No allocations are performed; only existing elements in {\ttfamily a} are modified. 
\end{DoxyNote}
